phases.description: CMake scaffold, APVTS + AU/VST3 targets, chowdsp_wdf smoke test
phases.label: PHASE 0
phases.name: Scaffold

phases.description: Derive analytic transfer functions and WDF/ideal-op-amp implementations for every V1 Early linear stage, validated against reference-fr-targets.md
phases.label: PHASE 1
phases.name: V1 Early linear stages

phases.description: Rail-clip nonlinearity, oversampling, and ADAA for the V1 Early drive stage
phases.label: PHASE 2
phases.name: V1 Early nonlinearity + oversampling

phases.description: Full-chain integration and level calibration for V1 Early (kInputRef, kOutputMakeup)
phases.label: PHASE 3
phases.name: V1 Early integration

phases.description: Bespoke WDF element for the reverse-breakdown zener-pair clip shared by V1 Late/V2 (ZenerPairT.h)
phases.label: PHASE 4
phases.name: Zener clip research spike

phases.description: V1 Late DSP graph reusing Phase 1 primitives plus the zener drive module
phases.label: PHASE 5
phases.name: V1 Late DSP

phases.description: V2 DSP graph: MID stage, BASS SHIFT, zener drive module reuse
phases.label: PHASE 6
phases.name: V2 DSP

phases.description: Runtime revision switch with glitch-free crossfade between the three DSP graphs
phases.label: PHASE 7
phases.name: Revision switching

phases.description: Pedal face UI, peripheral elements, per-revision layout
phases.label: PHASE 8
phases.name: UI

phases.description: Performance/fidelity probes, CI wiring, factory presets, UI asset polish
phases.label: PHASE 9
phases.name: Probes, CI, polish

phases.description: Close FR/THD gaps between the plugin and real-pedal (NAM) captures; re-anchor calibration constants per revision
phases.label: PHASE 10
phases.name: Capture validation
